about.title: About Us
about.description: URBAN SPACE is an architectural studio specializing in modern architectural and urban solutions. We believe in creating spaces that inspire, endure, and enhance the human experience.
about.missionText: To create exceptional architectural solutions that harmonize innovation with sustainability, while respecting cultural context and enhancing quality of life.
about.visionText: To be recognized as a leading architectural practice that shapes the future of urban living through thoughtful, innovative design.

services.title: Services
services.description: Comprehensive architectural and urban planning services tailored to your needs.

process.title: How We Work
process.description: Our proven process ensures successful project delivery from concept to completion.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We begin with a thorough understanding of your vision, requirements, and project goals through detailed discussions.

concept.title: Concept Development
concept.description: Our team develops initial concepts and ideas, exploring various design directions that align with your vision.

design.title: Design Development
design.description: We refine the chosen concept into detailed architectural drawings, specifications, and 3D visualizations.

development.title: Technical Documentation
development.description: Complete construction documents, technical specifications, and coordination with engineering teams.

supervision.title: Construction Supervision
supervision.description: We oversee the construction process to ensure the design is executed to the highest standards.
